title: Building a Personal AI Model Map [AI Operators Bonus Episode]

mentions.quoted_text: One of the things that I was contemplating at the end of last year was actually doing a spin-off podcast called AI Operators.
mentions.context_snippet: One of the things that I was contemplating at the end of last year was actually doing a spin-off podcast called AI Operators. The idea of AI Operators would basically be what I was calling a skills cast, where instead of focusing on the AI news, it would be all about using AI tools, building AI projects.

facts.fact_value: A proposed spin-off podcast focused on AI tools and building AI projects.

mentions.quoted_text: It's still something that's very much on the table. But where I wanted to start it first was to experiment with it in the context of the existing AI Daily Brief community.
mentions.context_snippet: But where I wanted to start it first was to experiment with it in the context of the existing AI Daily Brief community.

facts.fact_value: An existing community related to AI news and projects.

mentions.quoted_text: And thus was born the Model Map Builder application.
mentions.context_snippet: And thus was born the Model Map Builder application. Now I'm using Lovable for this, but you could use Repl.it, you could use Claude Code.

facts.fact_value: An application to contain and organize personalized AI model recommendations and test results.
